candidate_decisions.rationale: The draft consolidates open-format knowledge-file guidance into a portable candidate that can stand on its own because the approved repository inventory has no Obsidian-specific Skill to merge into. It remains only a payload proposal until a later diff gate writes a Skill body, manifest entry, and routing evidence.

rejected_alternatives.reason: The approved release inventory has no Obsidian-specific Skill directory to receive a bounded merge.
The open-format knowledge-file guidance can be useful without requiring a live Obsidian CLI runtime.
The draft is sufficiently portable to justify a later payload proposal instead of passive evidence only.

candidate_decisions.overlap_handling: Do not merge into local-only obsidian-vault runtime state; a later payload gate must define a public-safe standalone surface or approved merge target from repository truth.
candidate_decisions.security_boundary: No vault mutation, file write, or local app control is authorized in this gate.
candidate_decisions.portability_boundary: Obsidian-specific syntax must stay explicit and separate from generic Markdown or generic document workflows.

candidate_decisions.source_asset_boundary: No upstream source assets are redistributed.
